subject: Sociology
title: Religion in the Global South
description: A 60-second lesson on Religion in the Global South.

hook.text: While Europe's churches empty, Christianity and Islam are booming across Africa and Asia.

buildup.text: Pentecostalism alone gains 25,000 new followers daily, mostly in Latin America, Africa, and Asia.

discovery.text: Global South religions blend local traditions with imported faiths, creating vibrant hybrid practices.

twist.text: Secularization theory was built on European data. It missed most of the world's religious experience.

climax.text: The future of religion isn't decline. It's transformation and geographic shift on a massive scale.

quiz.question: What is happening to religion in the Global South?
